title: Pale Monarch
description: A mod about a boss and 2 items
body:
(REQUIRES GECKOLIB)

This mod is about a powerful new boss, Which can be a great challenge. When you kill him, you can get his powerful axe.

To summon him, you must find a Monarch Idol, usually traded by wandering traders. Then you have to right click the Monarch Idol to summon him.
